
# TOP-TIER BCM ECU RUNTIME SIMULATION

## Features
- Real-time ECU runtime simulation
- Professional automotive console traces
- CAN runtime communication
- DTC diagnostics
- Runtime analytics engine
- CSV telemetry logging
- Safety degradation handling
- ECU health analysis
- Timestamped runtime events

## Build
make

## Run
./bcm_sim

## Generated Files
- bcm_runtime.csv

## Concepts Demonstrated
- Embedded C
- ECU architecture
- Automotive diagnostics
- CAN communication
- Runtime telemetry
- Safety monitoring
- Analytics systems
